tasks.label: Initialize Project Pixie Structure
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'ProjectPixie/01_ideation', 'ProjectPixie/02_product_spec', 'ProjectPixie/03_architecture', 'ProjectPixie/04_project_mgmt', 'ProjectPixie/05_qa_evals', 'ProjectPixie/src/core', 'ProjectPixie/src/utils', 'ProjectPixie/tests'; New-Item -ItemType File -Force -Path 'ProjectPixie/.gitignore', 'ProjectPixie/requirements.txt'; Out-File -FilePath 'ProjectPixie/.gitignore' -InputObject '# Python virtual environments`n.venv/`n__pycache__/`n*.pyc`n`n# IDE Configurations`n.vscode/`n.idea/`n`n# Environment configurations`n.env' -Encoding utf8; Out-File -FilePath 'ProjectPixie/requirements.txt' -InputObject 'ollama>=0.2.1`npydantic>=2.7.0`npytest>=8.0.0`npython-dotenv>=1.0.1' -Encoding utf8; Write-Host '🧚‍♀️ Project Pixie Structure successfully created via VS Code Tasks!' -ForegroundColor Green
